transcript: hey there before we dive in if you're ready to transform your life hit that subscribe button and join our community of growth and motivation now let me tell you something right now the difference between where you are and where you want to be is all about mindset the 1% mindset it's the way you see the world it's the way you face challenges it's the way you think when times are tough that's what makes the 1% different from the rest it's not the money in the bank it's not the connections they have it's the choices they make every single day let me be real with you we all get 24 hours in a day just like Bill Gates just like Elon Musk just like that person you look up to. What are you doing with your 24 hours? You see, the 1% don't waste their time. They don't let distractions pull them away from their goals. They don't spend hours scrolling through social media. They don't get lost in pointless gossip. They know what they want, and they are willing to put in the work every single day. You know, most people think that success is about talent or luck. They think that the 1% were born with something special. Something that others just don't have. But let me tell you the truth. It's not about being the smartest person in the room. It's not about being the most talented. It's about consistency. The 1% mindset is about showing up, even when you don't feel like it. It's about doing the work when nobody is watching, when nobody is applauding, when nobody even believes in you. It's easy to put in the work when things are going well, when life is smooth, but can you keep pushing when the obstacles come, the setbacks hit when you feel like everything is against you the 1% understand one simple thing growth happens outside of comfort they understand that if you want something you've never had you have to be willing to do something you've never done most people want the reward but they don't want the struggle they want the success but they don't want the sacrifice but the one percent they embrace the struggle they know that the challenges they face today are the training ground for the strength they'll need tomorrow they are willing to invest in themselves in their their education, in their health, in their mindset, because they know the return on that investment is a life that most people only dream of. The 1% mindset is not just about financial success. It's about being the best version of yourself in every aspect of your life. It's about being the best parent, the best partner, the best best leader it's about living a life that's true to your values a life that inspires others a life that leaves a legacy the 1% don't settle for mediocrity they don't settle for good enough they strive for greatness not because they want the recognition but because they know they are capable of more, and they refuse to waste their potential. You've got to understand this. There's no magic formula. There's no secret to success that only the 1% know. The truth is it's simple, but it's not easy. It's about discipline. It's about resilience. It's about getting up one more time than you fall. It's about making sacrifices today so you can enjoy the rewards tomorrow. Most people quit when things get hard. Most people settle when they face resistance. But the 1%? They push through. They keep going. They find a way. Let me share a story with you. Imagine a bamboo tree. When you plant a bamboo tree, you have to water it and nurture it every single day. For years, you see nothing. No growth. No sign that anything is happening. You keep watering. You keep nurturing. And still, nothing. But you keep going. And then, one day, the bamboo tree shoots up, sometimes growing as much as 90 feet in just a few weeks. all that time the bamboo was growing roots building a foundation preparing for that moment of explosive growth and that's how it is with the one percent mindset you put in the work you keep going even when you don't see the results right away. Because you know that eventually, you will break through. You've got to train your mind to see opportunities where others see obstacles. You've got to believe in yourself when nobody else does. You've got to be willing to put in the work, day in and day out, even when it feels like you're not making progress. Because the truth is, every small step you take, every small decision you make, is bringing you closer to your goals. It's not about massive leaps. It's about those tiny consistent actions that compound over time. The 1% know that greatness is not about what you do once in a while. It's about what you do every day. It's about habits. It's about routines. It's about the little things that add up to something extraordinary. You see, success is not a single event. It's a process. It's not about one big moment. It's about all the small moments that lead up to it it's about showing up every single day even when you don't feel like it even when it's hard even when you want to quit because that's what separates the one percent from the rest ladies and gentlemen you have to make a choice are you going to be part of the 99%? Or are you going to step up and become part of the 1%? Are you going to let excuses hold you back? Or are you going to take responsibility for your life and go after what you want? The 1% mindset is about ownership. It's about understanding that no one is coming to save you. No one is going to do the work for you. You are responsible for your own success. You are responsible for your own happiness. And you have everything you need within you to make it happen. Most people live their lives waiting for the perfect moment. They wait for the right time, the right opportunity, the right person to come along and make everything better. But the truth is, there is no perfect moment. There is no right time. There is only now. The 1% understand this. They don't wait for life to happen to them. They make life happen. They take action. They create opportunities. They make decisions, and they move move forward they understand that the only way to achieve their goals is to take action to keep moving to keep striving no matter what so I challenge you today stop waiting for the perfect moment stop waiting for the right opportunity for someone to give, for someone to believe in you. The 1% don't wait. They create. They take action. They bet on themselves. They take risks. They make sacrifices. And they keep moving forward no matter what. Because they know that at the end of the day, the only thing that matters is whether or not they gave it their all. And here's something else you need to know. Failure is part of the journey. The 1% fail more than anyone else, because they're willing to try more than anyone else. They don't see failure as the end. They see it as a lesson, as an opportunity to to grow as a stepping stone on the path to success they understand that every failure brings them one step closer to success they embrace failure they learn from it and they use it to get better you have the power to change your life you have the power to become part of the one%. But it starts with your mindset. It starts with the choices you make every single day. It starts with deciding that you are worthy of success, that you are capable of greatness, and that you will do whatever it takes to get there. Let me ask you this. What do you really want? What kind of life do you want to live? What kind of impact do you want to make? What kind of legacy do you want to leave behind? The 1% have a clear vision of what they want. They know what they're working towards. They have goals. They have dreams. And they are willing to do whatever it takes to make them a reality. They don't let fear hold them back. They don't let doubt stop them. They don't let obstacles stand in their way. They have a vision. And they go after it with everything they've got. Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to stop settling. It's time to step up. It's time to embrace the one percent mindset and start living the life you know you are capable of the journey won't be easy but I promise you this it will be worth it so get up take action and never ever give up the one percent mindset is within your reach the only question is are you willing to go after it?
